extraction.one_line_summary: BARDET Romain won from an 18-rider breakaway after attacking for KOM points then holding off chasers to the mountaintop finish at Pico Villuercas.
tactical_patterns: BARDET attacked specifically for KOM points on first climb, used those efforts to select himself for stage win later.
LOPEZ Miguel Angel launched late steepest-gradient attack, gained 20 seconds on ROGLIC before team closed to single digits at line.
JUMBO-VISMA allowed LOPEZ time gap rather than burn ROGLIC on back-to-back mountain stages, clear multi-day energy management.
18-rider break gained 10+ minutes as peloton conceded stage entirely, showing GC teams prioritizing following day's bigger mountains.

rider_signals.BARDET Romain: positive: Outsprinted breakaway rivals for KOM points then maintained superiority to finish, motivated by teammate STORER's recent wins
rider_signals.LOPEZ Miguel Angel: positive: Strongest GC climber on steepest gradients of final climb, took back significant time from ROGLIC with late acceleration
rider_signals.IKING Odd Christian: positive: Defended red jersey at back of GC group on category 1 finish despite INEOS lacking mountain firepower
rider_signals.KUSS Sepp: positive: Paced entire final climb for ROGLIC after earlier work, still had strength to close LOPEZ gap in final meters
rider_signals.HOLMES Matthew: negative: Flatted during early break selection with team car too far back, demonstrates support vehicle positioning critical in breakaway formation
